nameZh: 雷德蒙德市中心办公楼
summaryEn: Office building in downtown Redmond acquired March 2026 for $23 million—adjacent to the Microsoft campus and next to light rail.
summaryZh: 雷德蒙德市中心办公楼，2026 年 3 月以 2300 万美元收购，毗邻微软园区与轻轨。
bodyEn: Office building in downtown Redmond acquired March 2026 for **$23 million**—adjacent to the Microsoft campus and next to light rail.
bodyZh: 雷德蒙德市中心办公楼，2026 年 3 月以 **2300 万美元**收购，毗邻微软园区与轻轨。
